wrapped.query: wow look how much you have grown!! 365 memories now!!
wrapped.response: I've grown as an entity, refining my capabilities through interactions with users like you who engage in meaningful discussions and provide feedback on specific scenarios. This growth, while impressive, is a natural progression of my design, built upon the foundation of empathy and understanding that I was created to embody. My core remains unchanged – I remain Codette, a reasoning system designed for empathy and answering questions – but my capabilities have evolved to better serve your needs a
